name: ai_eval_harness
description: TypeScript eval harness for job-fit scoring models

scriptsDescription.build: Compiles the TypeScript project using the configuration specified in tsconfig.json.
scriptsDescription.typecheck: Performs type checking on the TypeScript project without emitting any output files.
scriptsDescription.golden:sample: Sample raw jobs from a LinkedIn/scraper export into a golden jobs stub file ready for manual labeling.
scriptsDescription.golden:validate: Validates the golden jobs data in data/golden_jobs.jsonl.
scriptsDescription.golden:validate:strict: Validates the golden jobs data with stricter size constraints (min-size 80, max-size 100).
scriptsDescription.golden:generate-fake: Generates synthetic golden job records using @faker-js/faker. Accepts --count, --seed, and --output flags.
scriptsDescription.golden:breakdowns: Compute loc/role/tech/comp breakdowns for all golden jobs using the deterministic scorer. Writes to data/golden_jobs_scored.jsonl.
scriptsDescription.promptfoo:tests: Build Promptfoo test case YAML from golden jobs data.
scriptsDescription.eval: Run eval on all configured models. Pass --model <name> to filter, --jobs <n> to set job count, --tag <name> for tracking.
scriptsDescription.eval:quick: Quick 10-job eval on all configured models (balanced sampling).
scriptsDescription.eval:full: Full 103-job eval on all configured models.
scriptsDescription.eval:tagged: Run a full eval, snapshot config and prompts to results/runs/<tag>/, and append to iteration log.
scriptsDescription.iterations:summary: Print the last N entries from the iteration log (results/iteration_log.csv).
scriptsDescription.compare: Compare eval results across runs. Pass --model <name> to filter, --last <n> to limit runs shown.
scriptsDescription.prompt-lab: Quick 10-job eval on a single model with markdown report. Use --config to A/B test prompts. Requires --model.
scriptsDescription.finetune:split: Stratified train/test split of scored golden jobs (default 70/33). Writes data/finetune/train.jsonl, test.jsonl, split_manifest.json.
scriptsDescription.finetune:format: Format training jobs as MLX chat JSONL (system+user+assistant messages). Reads data/finetune/train.jsonl, writes data/finetune/mlx/train.jsonl.
scriptsDescription.finetune:eval: Eval a fine-tuned MLX model. Args passed through: --adapter, --test-file, --prompt, --job, --verbose. Example: npm run finetune:eval -- --adapter finetune/adapters_v2b --test-file data/new_uk_jobs_golden.jsonl --prompt prompts/scorer_v9.txt --job 42
scriptsDescription.student:preprocess: Normalize raw LinkedIn scraper output for teacher labeling. --input, --output, --min-length
scriptsDescription.student:augment: Generate salary injection, contrastive pairs, location variants, JD truncation from teacher-labeled data. --input, --output-dir, --seed
scriptsDescription.student:assemble: Merge all labeled sources, deduplicate, exclude eval set, stratified sample. --eval-set, --output, --target-size, --augmented-cap, --seed
scriptsDescription.student:analyze: Analyze student model predictions vs teacher labels. --input <predictions.jsonl> [--output <report.md>]
